alert.name: number
alert.description: The security alert number.

alert.name: created_at
alert.description: The time that the alert was created in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ.

alert.name: url
alert.description: The REST API URL of the alert resource.

alert.name: html_url
alert.description: The GitHub URL of the alert resource.

alert.name: locations_url
alert.description: The REST API URL of the code locations for this alert.

alert.name: resolution
alert.description: The reason for resolving the alert.

alert.name: resolved_at
alert.description: The time that the alert was resolved in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ.

alert.name: resolved_by
alert.description: A GitHub user.

alert.name: resolution_comment
alert.description: An optional comment to resolve an alert.

alert.name: secret_type
alert.description: The type of secret that secret scanning detected.

alert.name: secret_type_display_name
alert.description: User-friendly name for the detected secret, matching the secret_type. For a list of built-in patterns, see "Supported secret scanning patterns."

alert.name: validity
alert.description: The token status as of the latest validity check.

alert.name: push_protection_bypassed
alert.description: Whether push protection was bypassed for the detected secret.

alert.name: push_protection_bypassed_by
alert.description: A GitHub user.

alert.name: push_protection_bypassed_at
alert.description: The time that push protection was bypassed in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ.

alert.name: push_protection_bypass_request_reviewer
alert.description: A GitHub user.

alert.name: push_protection_bypass_request_reviewer_comment
alert.description: An optional comment when reviewing a push protection bypass.

alert.name: push_protection_bypass_request_comment
alert.description: An optional comment when requesting a push protection bypass.

alert.name: push_protection_bypass_request_html_url
alert.description: The URL to a push protection bypass request.

alert.name: multi_repo
alert.description: Whether the detected secret was found in multiple repositories in the same organization or business.

alert.name: assigned_to
alert.description: A GitHub user.
